'''''Lauhu''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] which served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

It once supplied the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Anvil (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Anvil'']] which was carrying the survivors of the destroyed [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Maximus]]''. During that operation, ''Anvil'' sustained two attacks from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] escort frigate ''[[Firelance]]'', which launched squadrons of [[TIE series/Legends|TIEs]]. ''Lauhu'' escaped largely unscathed, but the ''Anvil'' was damaged beyond repair and was later abandoned.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]'' {{1st}}
